cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog is standing in a narrow hallway or between two chairs, creating a channel. The trainer is in front of the dog, holding a treat. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot establishing the setup, which encourages backward movement instead of turning around.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer takes a step towards the dog, invading its space slightly. The dog naturally takes a step back to maintain distance. The trainer immediately says 'Sim!' and gives the treat. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera is at a low angle, capturing the dog's backward step clearly. The reward is given instantly.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer repeats the process, now adding the word 'Para Trás' just before stepping forward. The dog takes a few steps back. Jackpot reward. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera follows the dog as it takes several successful backward steps. A 'Jackpot!' animation celebrates the learning.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Now in an open space, the trainer gives the hand signal (a flat palm moving towards the dog) and says 'Para Trás'. The dog walks backward several feet in a straight line. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A clear shot of the dog performing the behavior on command, without the hallway channel, showing generalization.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of a dog doing the 'moonwalk' with Michael Jackson-style graphics and lighting. A fun, cool way to show off the trick. Text overlay: 'Para Trás: O Passo de Mágica'. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A humorous and stylish shot with fun animations. The text appears in a cool, retro font.
